state.coderResponse:
All validation gates pass and every success criterion is verified. Here's the summary:

## Results

**Two new files created** in the existing `internal/generate` package:

| File | Role |
|------|------|
| `internal/generate/rescue.go` | `func Rescue(out *ui.Output, tree, parent, candidate string)` — pure render of the PRD §18.3 rescue block to stderr |
| `internal/generate/rescue_test.go` | White-box `package generate` tests covering the full MOCKING matrix |

**All 5 validation gates green:**
- ✅ Level 1: `go build ./internal/generate/` — clean
- ✅ Level 2: `go vet ./internal/generate/` — clean
- ✅ Level 3: `gofmt -l internal/generate/` — empty
- ✅ Level 4: `go test ./internal/generate/` — PASS (3 dedupe + 5 rescue tests, all green)
- ✅ Level 5: `go test ./...` — whole-module green (config/git/prompt/provider/ui unaffected)

**Contract details honored:**
- Plain `package generate` line + adjacent file-level comment deferring the `// Package generate` doc to generate.go (mirrors dedupe.go / internal/git/log.go)
- Imports: `fmt`+internal/ui (rescue.go); `bytes`+`io`+`strings`+`testing`+internal/ui (rescue_test.go) — no go-git/testify/`fmt` in tests
- FR51 routing: every line via `out.Progressf` (stderr); root command omits `-p` (parent==""); static omit-note keeps literal `<parent>` placeholder; candidate line uses explicit `"%s"` (not `%q`), emitted only when candidate != ""
- `Rescue` is render-only: no `os.Exit`, no return value; godoc cites PRD §18.2/§18.3, FR43–FR45, reference_impl.md §5, FR51, the root-omits-`-p` enrichment, and that `ui.ExitRescue==3` is set by the CALLER
- FR51 test proves stdout stays clean; root test uses the `commit-tree -p` adjacency to isolate the command from the static note's literal `-p`
- go.mod/go.sum unchanged, no `go mod tidy`; generate.go (S1) and signal handler (M6.T2.S1) NOT created

```json
{
   "result": "success",
   "message": "P1_M6_T1_S3 implemented: added internal/generate/rescue.go (pure-render Rescue printing the PRD §18.3 rescue block to stderr via out.Progressf, with root-omits-`-p` enrichment and conditional candidate line) and internal/generate/rescue_test.go (white-box package generate, table-driven MOCKING matrix incl. FR51 stdout-clean + root-omits-`-p` adjacency assertions). All 5 validation gates pass: go build clean, go vet clean, gofmt -l empty, go test ./internal/generate/ PASS (dedupe + 5 rescue tests), go test ./... whole-module green. Scope respected: only the 2 new files, go.mod/go.sum unchanged, imports = fmt+internal/ui (rescue.go) and bytes+io+strings+testing+internal/ui (rescue_test.go), no os.Exit, no go-git/testify, plain `package generate` line deferring the doc to generate.go."
}
```
